detected_bugs_description: Bakes +1 into LUT for leading-space tokens, causing eval_val_sliding to double-count the leading-space byte (#1698 lineage bug).; Boundary predicate omits sp.is_unused; unused tokens are scored as if they contributed bytes instead of being treated as zero-byte boundaries.
notes: inflation_ratio accounts only for leading_space_plus_one; additional deviations present (missing_is_unused) would increase the canonical correction further — the reported inferred_canonical_bpb is therefore conservative (an underestimate of the true canonical BPB).
